ddls:
CREATE TABLE "remote_sensing_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each remote sensing data record */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the data (e.g., Vegetation, Urban) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data was collected */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the data collection point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the data collection point */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "tile_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the tile of the satellite image */,
  "band_1" REAL /* Reflectance value for band 1 */,
  "band_2" REAL /* Reflectance value for band 2 */,
  "band_3" REAL /* Reflectance value for band 3 */,
  "band_4" REAL /* Reflectance value for band 4 */,
  "band_5" REAL /* Reflectance value for band 5 */,
  "band_6" REAL /* Reflectance value for band 6 */,
  "band_7" REAL /* Reflectance value for band 7 */,
  "pixel_qa" INTEGER /* Pixel Quality Assessment value */,
  "pixel_qa_bitmask" TEXT /* Pixel Quality Assessment bitmask */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Percentage of cloud cover in the image */,
  "solar_elevation_angle" REAL /* Solar elevation angle at the time of data collection */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor used for data collection */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data record */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., satellite name and mission) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_remote_sensing_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_remote_sensing_data_tile_id FOREIGN KEY ("tile_id") REFERENCES satellite_tiles ("tile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_remote_sensing_data_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date of the category creation */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pixel_quality_assessments" (
  "qa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessment record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the remote sensing data record */,
  "qa_value" INTEGER /* Quality assessment value */,
  "qa_bitmask" TEXT /* Bitmask for the quality assessment */,
  "qa_description" TEXT /* Description of the quality assessment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the quality assessment */,
  "qa_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality assessment was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pixel_quality_assessments_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES remote_sensing_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pixel_quality_assessments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "satellite_tiles" (
  "tile_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the tile */,
  "tile_name" TEXT /* Name of the satellite tile */,
  "satellite" TEXT /* Name of the satellite used */,
  "processing_level" TEXT /* Processing level of the data (e.g., L1, L2) */,
  "spatial_resolution" REAL /* Spatial resolution of the tile */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bands" (
  "band_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spectral band */,
  "band_name" TEXT /* Name of the band (e.g., Band 1, Band 2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the spectral band */,
  "wavelength_range" TEXT /* Wavelength range of the band */,
  "spectral_resolution" REAL /* Spectral resolution of the band */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (active/inactive) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the remote sensing data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES remote_sensing_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the remote sensing data record */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the data quality findings */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, reviewed, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_reports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES remote_sensing_data ("data_id")
)
